title: Saudi Apple Croquettes
description: A delicious and crispy dessert inspired by Saudi cuisine, featuring a sweet apple filling in a crunchy croquette.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the flour and spice mix.
Add the melted butter and mix until the dough comes together.
Peel and chop the apples, then add them to the dough and mix well.
Wrap the dough around the croquettes, sealing the edges.
Deep-fry the croquettes until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve warm.
